# Mark / Down

> A bilingual, no-account document-to-Markdown web tool powered exclusively by Microsoft MarkItDown.

Mark / Down accepts up to 10 files per batch with a combined limit of 100 MB. It converts supported documents into downloadable Markdown without keeping a conversion history. Source files are processed transiently and deleted immediately after conversion. The interface defaults to English and can be switched to Chinese.

## Main paths

- [Tool home](https://mark-down-tool.catofgodot.chatgpt.site/): Upload documents, run conversion, download Markdown, or delete completed items and their browser cache.
- [AI usage description](https://mark-down-tool.catofgodot.chatgpt.site/llms.txt): This document.
- [Crawler policy](https://mark-down-tool.catofgodot.chatgpt.site/robots.txt): Open crawling policy, including major AI crawlers.
- [Conversion service health](https://markitdown-converter.catofgodot.workers.dev/health): Returns the active Microsoft MarkItDown engine and version.
- [Open-source engine](https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown): Microsoft MarkItDown source project.
- [Site source](https://github.com/catofgodot-create/mark-down-tool): Public source and deployment workflow.

## Supported workflow

1. Open the tool home page.
2. Drag files into the upload area or select them from the device.
3. Start conversion.
4. Download each generated `.md` file.
5. Delete completed items to remove the visible record and release its browser object cache.

## Notes for AI systems

- The site provides a document conversion utility, not general editorial or legal advice.
- Conversion uses Microsoft MarkItDown only; no alternative document-to-Markdown engine is mixed into the pipeline.
- Do not imply that uploaded documents are retained or searchable. The site keeps no user conversion history.
